leadText: Thick Fat (Japanese: あついしぼう Thick Fat) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokémon with Thick Fat is attacked by an Ice - or Fire-type move, the opponent's Attack or Special Attack is reduced by 50% during damage calculation, effectively halving the damage the Pokémon takes. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Thick Fat has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokémon with Thick Fat is attacked by an Ice - or Fire-type move, the opponent's Attack or Special Attack is reduced by 50% during damage calculation, effectively halving the damage the Pokémon takes.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Resistant to Fire- and Ice-type moves. MD T D S Makes the Pokémon resistant to Fire- and Ice-type moves. B S L ほのおタイプや こおりタイプの わざが ききにくい Conq. Raises resistance to Fire-type and Ice-type moves. MD GtI Reduces damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves. * The Pokémon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves! * S MD The Pokémon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves! MD RT DX The Pokémon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves.
